Author: Anup Biswas
Message:
feat: implement complete notification system

Backend:
- Created billoria_notifications module with Firebase Cloud Messaging V1 API
- NotificationManager service for creating/managing notifications
- FirebaseService with push notification support
- REST API endpoints for notifications CRUD operations
- FCM token management (register/unregister/list)
- Admin UI for sending notifications with push support
- Rate limit configuration for notifications endpoints (300/hour)

Frontend:
- Firebase SDK integration (messaging + analytics)
- NotificationCenter component with bell icon dropdown
- Full notifications pages for all roles (admin/agency/owner/brand)
- Push notification prompt modal (BEM CSS)
- AnalyticsProvider with auto page view tracking
- notifications API client module
- Role-based profile routing
- CSS fixes for dropdown backgrounds

Features:
- Real-time push notifications via FCM
- Notification types: booking, payment, verification, system, announcement, welcome, promotion
- Filter notifications by type and read/unread status
- Mark as read / mark all as read / delete functionality
- Unread count badge
- Auto-refresh every minute
- Analytics event tracking on notification clicks
- Responsive design with mobile support

Configuration:
- Firebase config with measurementId for Analytics
- DDEV manager script for easier project management
- Updated copilot instructions with CSS conventions (BEM naming)

Author: Anup Biswas
Message:
Rename billoria_onboarding to billoria_accounts and add v1 API versioning

Module Changes:
- Renamed module: billoria_onboarding → billoria_accounts
- Updated module name: 'Billoria Onboarding' → 'Billoria Accounts'
- Updated description to reflect account management scope
- Updated all PHP namespaces and references
- Updated routing file references

API Versioning (v1):
- Added /api/v1/ prefix to all endpoints
- Routes versioned: register, verify-email, verify-phone, resend-verification, user/profile, organization/{nid}/status, request-phone-otp
- Prepares for future v2 development

Files Added:
- billoria_accounts module (12 files)
- frontendapp/ONBOARDING_INTEGRATION.md

Files Removed:
- billoria_onboarding/billoria_onboarding.routing.yml (superseded)

Status: Module installed and tested ✅
